chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-675 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 02-12-2022 Mr. Ghulam Shabbir Mari advocate for applicant. Ms. Rameshan Oad, Assistant Prosecutor General Sindh. Mr. Muhammad Akram Rajput advocate files power on behalf of respondent No.6, taken on record and submits that alleged detainee has filed a suit for dissolution of marriage in Court of Civil/Family Judge-II, Hala where currently she resides with her father, who is present. No case under section 491 Cr.P.C. is made out in the facts and circumstances. Accordingly, instant criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed. JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
